title: Psychology Vocabulary
description: Cognitive biases, defense mechanisms, attachment styles, self-efficacy.
summary_pt_br: Psicologia: viés cognitivo, viés de confirmação, apego (seguro/ansioso/evitativo), autoeficácia.

scenes.subtitle_en: Cognitive biases, defense mechanisms, attachment styles, self-efficacy.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Psicologia: viés cognitivo, viés de confirmação, apego (seguro/ansioso/evitativo), autoeficácia.

scenes.text_en: Cognitive biases, defense mechanisms, attachment styles, self-efficacy. Focus: psychology vocabulary. Confirmation bias makes us see only what we expect.
scenes.text_pt: Psicologia: viés cognitivo, viés de confirmação, apego (seguro/ansioso/evitativo), autoeficácia. Foco: psychology vocabulary. O viés de confirmação nos faz ver só o que esperamos.

scenes.title: Psychology Vocabulary
scenes.body_en: Core terms: COGNITIVE BIAS, CONFIRMATION BIAS, ATTACHMENT (secure/anxious/avoidant), SELF-EFFICACY, DEFENSE MECHANISM, EMOTIONAL REGULATION.
scenes.body_pt: Psicologia: viés cognitivo, viés de confirmação, apego (seguro/ansioso/evitativo), autoeficácia.

examples.en: Confirmation bias makes us see only what we expect.
examples.pt: O viés de confirmação nos faz ver só o que esperamos.

examples.en: Self-efficacy predicts persistence more than talent does.
examples.pt: A autoeficácia prediz persistência mais do que o talento.

examples.en: Emotional regulation is learned, not inherited.
examples.pt: A regulação emocional é aprendida, não herdada.

exercise.question: Complete: "___ bias makes us see only what we expect."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Confirmation bias makes us see only what we expect."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O viés de confirmação nos faz ver só o que esperamos.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Self-efficacy predicts persistence more than talent does.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Self-efficacy predicts persistence more than talent does."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A autoeficácia prediz persistência mais do que o talento.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Psychology Vocabulary — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre psychology vocabulary. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Noticing only what confirms your belief.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Give an example from daily life.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Clicking only headlines that match your view.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Belief in your ability to accomplish a task.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How does regulation differ from suppression?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Psychology is vocabulary for seeing yourself clearly.

scenes.title: The psychology lecture
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize three concepts discussed. Use at least three psychology terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the university open lecture, Maya attended a talk on cognitive biases and emotional regulation in daily life.

paragraphs.speaker: Lecturer
paragraphs.en: Confirmation bias causes us to notice only the evidence that already supports our existing beliefs.

paragraphs.speaker: Lecturer
paragraphs.en: Self-efficacy — the belief that effort translates into outcome — predicts persistence more reliably than measured talent.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: Does attachment style from childhood still predict adult relationship patterns, or can it be rewritten?

paragraphs.speaker: Lecturer
paragraphs.en: Emotional regulation is a learned skill — attachment is a template that practice can slowly revise.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Psychology, Maya wrote in her notebook, is the rare subject where knowing the vocabulary changes the experience itself.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Psychology Vocabulary". Cognitive biases, defense mechanisms, attachment styles, self-efficacy. Confirmation bias makes us see only what we expect. Self-efficacy predicts persistence more than talent does. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Psychology Vocabulary". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
